scripts.build: bun run --cwd packages/types build && bun run --cwd packages/utils build && bun run --cwd packages/core build && bun run --cwd packages/rest build && bun run --cwd packages/gateway build && bun run --cwd packages/cache build && bun run --cwd packages/cli build
scripts.test: bun test packages/core/tests packages/gateway/tests packages/rest/tests packages/utils/tests packages/cache/tests
scripts.clean: bun run --cwd packages/types clean && bun run --cwd packages/utils clean && bun run --cwd packages/core clean && bun run --cwd packages/rest clean && bun run --cwd packages/gateway clean && bun run --cwd packages/cache clean && bun run --cwd packages/cli clean
